name: CRASH_UNIT_ID
description: A unique identifier for each vehicle record.

name: CRASH_RECORD_ID
description: This number can be used to link to the same crash in the Crashes and People datasets. This number also serves as a unique ID in the Crashes dataset.

name: CRASH_DATE
description: Date and time of crash as entered by the reporting officer

name: UNIT_NO
description: A unique ID for each unit within a specific crash report.

name: NUM_PASSENGERS
description: Number of passengers in the vehicle. The driver is not included. More information on passengers is in the People dataset.

name: MAKE
description: The make (brand) of the vehicle, if relevant

name: MODEL
description: The model of the vehicle, if relevant

name: LIC_PLATE_STATE
description: The state issuing the license plate of the vehicle, if relevant

name: VEHICLE_YEAR
description: The model year of the vehicle, if relevant

name: VEHICLE_TYPE
description: The type of vehicle, if relevant

name: VEHICLE_USE
description: The normal use of the vehicle, if relevant

name: TRAVEL_DIRECTION
description: The direction in which the unit was traveling prior to the crash, as determined by the reporting officer

name: MANEUVER
description: The action the unit was taking prior to the crash, as determined by the reporting officer

name: TOWED_I
description: Indicator of whether the vehicle was towed

name: OCCUPANT_CNT
description: The number of people in the unit, as determined by the reporting officer

name: EXCEED_SPEED_LIMIT_I
description: Indicator of whether the unit was speeding, as determined by the reporting officer

name: TOWED_BY
description: Entity that towed the unit, if relevant

name: TOWED_TO
description: Location to which the unit was towed, if relevant
